representative_quotes.name: Maria Santos
representative_quotes.rationale: This policy addresses economic pressures I've experienced directly and I believe it will help.

representative_quotes.name: James Johnson
representative_quotes.rationale: I have concerns about the funding mechanism â tax increases typically hurt small businesses.

representative_quotes.name: Ava Miller
representative_quotes.rationale: The rebate structure seems well designed to protect lower-income households like mine.

representative_quotes.name: Noah Williams
representative_quotes.rationale: Implementation details are unclear. I'd want to see pilot data before full rollout.

representative_quotes.name: Liam Brown
representative_quotes.rationale: My community has long needed this type of investment. This proposal is a step forward.
